name: Green Bean and Red Onion Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound green beans, trimmed and cut into 1 1/2-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a steamer rack in a large pot and bring 3 quarts of water to a boil.
2. Add the green beans to the steamer, cover, and steam until crisp-tender, about 4 minutes.
3. Halve the red onion lengthwise and slice it thinly crosswise.
4. In a bowl, whisk together balsamic vinegar, olive oil, salt, and pepper until emulsified.
5. Add the sliced onions to the dressing and toss to combine.
6. Remove the steamer from the heat and add the warm green beans to the bowl with the dressing and onions.
7. Toss everything together well to ensure all ingredients are evenly coated.
